title: Collected Wheel Publications Volume XXVI
author: Bhikkhu Bodhi
description: This book contains seventeen numbers of the renowned Wheel Publication series, dealing with various aspects of the Buddha’s teaching. Wheel Publication: 394–96: Fundamentals of Buddhism—Nyanatiloka Thera 397–98: A Simple Guide to Life—Robert Bogoda 399–01: Buddhism in Myanmar—Roger Bischoff 402–04:
